system.description:
Basic Discipline Technique. The psyker reads a person's aura — the unconscious projection of their being into the warp. Can be attempted on any visible person as a Full Action. DoS 0 = three strongest emotions, race, psychic status, rough health; DoS 1 = deeper insight (+10 Fellowship Tests vs target), precise Wounds/Fatigue, Psy Rating if psyker; DoS 2 = Insanity Points, addictions, disciplines if psyker; DoS 3 = Corruption Points, whether the aura is genuine or artificial. Maintaining the power on the same target adds +1 DoS per Round cumulatively.

Focus Power Test: Psyniscience
